message:
So, I was out walking my dog, Max, the other day when I realized I had packed a small backpack with all sorts of "just-in-case" goodies. You know, the usual treats, a spare leash, and even a couple of water bottles. My neighbor chuckled and said, "You really are the gloriously over-prepared person, huh?" 

I just smiled, because hey, you never know when a spontaneous picnic or a muddy paw situation might arise! It’s funny how a bit of preparedness can turn a simple walk into a mini-adventure. Plus, it gives me peace of mind knowing I’m ready for anything. 

Do you have any quirky items you always take with you on walks? This little refresher helped me remember to pack the essentials!
